Who do i pick here as a new player invested mainly into aequor?
If you have zero copies of everyone there, Castor E0 is good enough

BiS Support
Clementine, works at E0 and effiency improves with every following Enlightenment
BiS Shielder
Castor at E0, with E3 become a viable DPS / Sub DPS Option
BiS DPS
Kath / Pollux 
Needs E3, but when they do they both become one of the highest Damage dealing characters out there
Unique Discard Team
Corposant, ideally wants E2 to be effective as a Tank / Sub DPS and E3 to become a strong DPS Option

so, i'm trying to figure out if i want to develop a new team/faction archetype or just grab a good support?
You can make a Team immediately with Castor, Corpo, Kath and Pollux just that each following one will require more investment on their Teams

Castor, really only needs to have Jenkins to use as Main DPS and somebody to inflict Vulnerable
Corpo wants Aurita who you can easily receive and obtain Enlightenments for from the Shop, Cassiah is also really good for lining up your Cards in the Ultra Space and then you also need one more person to inflict Vulnerable
Kath can be played around with a majority of Chaos & Ultra Units, it's just that she herself needs to be E3 and something similar can be said for Pollux

But Kath can really just be used as your own Shielder too so having Castor on board can feel very redundant unless you're using him for the Weakness application but do keep in mind that he will also eat your Hand space
Because his Cards also have Retain attached

i have a question regarding ultra characters as im using them for the first time. regarding leap effects, do they only trigger when ultra space is full, or do they trigger at other times too (in general)?
they trigger if its the first card you played on the turn
oh okay, so guaranteed leap trigger if it's the first card played, and then 5 guaranteed triggers once ultra space is full
yep
its more like, you get an extra turn when ultra space is full
and in that extra turn, your leap effect all triggers
oh, so it's actually a full extra turn where you get to play cards?
yep
note that , in that extra round you dont draw card at start of turn
so you have to have cards ready?
so you will only be able to play the cards in ultra space+cards with retain
oh thank you, that makes a lot of sense
all the cards in ultra space will be put into your hand
ty, you made it easy to understand :)

on covenants: idk if you've played other games like this, but there are 6 different pieces to equip, if you equip 3 of the same set you get a bonus, and if you equip 6 of the same set you get a bigger unique bonus
you can reuse covenants across teams
so you basically get one of each set

Guys may I  get a Daffodil guide

Get Castor to E2 with your shards
Run Thais - Castor - Casiah/Erica - Daffodil 

Use Thais' exalt to dupe castor's 2-cost, it gives you aliemus for each plume in hand with Castor's E2, allowing you to continuously exalt him 
With Casiah you can also additionally pull it from the ultra space
With Erica you have alert to get more shield from each plume
With Caro Crimson Furnace on top of that, you shouldn't have any issues with surviving 

Once you've stacked a few plumes, you can go for the burst with Daffodil, make sure the enemy always have corruption on them before you deal damage
If you're choose to run Casiah, you can use Telekinesis to grab her second mirage from ultra space too

Hi I have a question for covenants. Just hit 45 so I can get sub-stats now, but I don’t have many of the stamp thingys. 
Is it better to level the covenants with desired main to +12 before rolling substats? And how do I get more stamps?

And you pull waifus?
Hey uh, question: Is it better to replace Tulu with Miryam if I have both of them at E0 once I get past Faded Legacy? (I've only played for 3 weeks pls be nice) <:cry2:1356068126894194758>
This is for a Gmurphy team, by the way (Currently I use GMurph, Tulu, Thais Celeste)
Yeah upgrade to +12 first. Regarding stamps, you either convert pens/spare paper into them or hoard on your stamina boxed and wait for the event that gives them for farming stages.
E0 Miryam is clunky imo, I would play with Tulu.
Thanks!
Be aware that pens are needed for locking substats. So yeah, if you are planning to convert them, always leave some for locking.
Thanks so much! One last thing uhh, In the future, if I get her to like, E2 or E3, do I slot her in? or would it be better to replace Celeste first instead
Where aliemus <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>
Stamps are easier to get than pens, there are usually some stamps in the event shop, but best case scenario is having to farm them from an event stage
